case_title: ANA CAREN MIS CONTRERAS VS. JUAN MANUEL PACHECO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $35(WAIVED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIS CONTRERAS, ANA CAREN AS TO DEFENDANT PACHECO, JUAN MANUEL DBA MARGARITA'S LANDSCAPE CO.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-23-2024 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANA CAREN MIS CONTRERAS IS PRESENT DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL PACHECO IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WERE BOTH ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED SPANICH INTERPRETER PILAR ESPINOSA #330288. RICHARD STANLY OF PREGRESSIVE INSURANCE TESTIFIED ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT. MR. STANLY TESTIFIED THAT PROGRESSIVE WOULD BE COVERING THIS AUTO ACCIDENCT CLAIM AND BY PAYING THE PLAINTIFF $79020.89 WITHIN THE NEXT THREE WEEKS. IF NO APPEARANCE AT THE NEXT HEARING THIS MATTER WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY MIS CONTRERAS, ANA CAREN PACHECO, JUAN MANUEL DBA MARGARITA'S LANDSCAPE CO.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ANA CAREN MIS CONTRERAS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT JUAN MANUEL PACHECO IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
